caption: A woman with her hair styled in a bun and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt is seated in a podcast studio. She is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. Behind her, a screen displays the text "Johnson" and "Employee Only," while the background consists of a white wall and a black panel separated by a yellow vertical strip. The on-screen graphic "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears in the lower-left and right areas of the scene. Across the sequence, the woman remains in a similar position, maintaining a slight, pleasant smile and looking off-camera to her left. There is minimal movement between the frames, as she remains relatively still while engaged in the recording environment, with the lighting and composition remaining consistent throughout the clip.
